title: Website audit and enhancement
body: Resolve build failures by fixing syntax errors, merge conflicts, and type inconsistencies, and create a missing Support page. The build was failing due to a combination of factors: a malformed `App.tsx` with incorrect JSX nesting, unresolved merge conflicts in `Header.tsx`, and numerous TypeScript errors across service pages (`InnovativeMicroSaasServices.tsx`, `NewServices.tsx`, `ComprehensiveInnovativeServices.tsx`) caused by inconsistent data structures and missing property checks. This PR systematically addresses these issues, including creating a new `Support.tsx` page, to restore a successful build. ---

title: Analyze, improve, and deploy ziontechgroup app
body: Resolve critical build errors, refactor application routing, and clean up the sitemap structure. The application was encountering numerous build failures due to JSX syntax errors, incorrect component usage (e.g., `PerformanceOptimizer` as a wrapper), merge conflicts in `Sitemap.tsx`, and widespread TypeScript errors stemming from duplicate imports, non-existent page references, and prop mismatches. This PR systematically addresses these issues to restore a functional build and improve code maintainability. ---
